roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOTION VACATE CONVICTION (PC1473,7); P & A, DEC, EXHIBITS FILED

/CAL  MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/X  TE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF SEPTEMBER 19, 1983/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:01-18-1983/X: SENTENCE DATE:09-19-1983//X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THEGUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 01-18-1983 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 09-19-1983 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEINGNO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
COURT VACATES SENTENCE AS TO IMPACTED CHARGES AND DISMISSES AND SEALSTHE CHARGES PURSUANT 11361,8(F)HS
MO REVK PROB DA GRTD;BW NB O/C
NO CAUSE DEF ABS;BW NB OR REVK O/C
